module_info.docstring:
Supabase store for FLUX Lens system.
Replaces Pinecone with PostgreSQL + pgvector for vector search and storage.
Implements consolidated tag system (76 tags instead of 511).

classes.name: SupabaseLensStore
classes.docstring: Supabase-based storage for FLUX lenses with vector search capabilities.

methods.name: local_model
methods.docstring: Lazy-load sentence-transformers model on first access (not on init).

methods.name: generate_query_embedding
methods.docstring:
Generate embedding for search queries using FREE local model.
This runs on the server's CPU, no API costs!

methods.name: generate_embedding_openai
methods.docstring:
Generate embedding using OpenAI (for admin/batch operations only).
Use this to pre-compute lens embeddings, not for runtime queries!

methods.name: generate_embedding
methods.docstring: Legacy method - redirects to OpenAI for admin operations.

methods.name: search_lenses
methods.docstring:
Search for lenses using vector similarity.

Args:
    query: Search query text
    k: Number of results to return
    filter_tags: Optional list of tags to filter by
    filter_frame: Optional frame to filter by
    filter_episode: Optional episode number to filter by
    similarity_threshold: Minimum similarity score (default 0.0)

Returns:
    List of lens dictionaries with similarity scores

methods.name: get_lens_by_id
methods.docstring: Get a specific lens by ID.

methods.name: get_all_lenses
methods.docstring: Get all lenses (or up to limit).

methods.name: get_lenses_by_episode
methods.docstring: Get all lenses from a specific episode.

methods.name: get_lenses_by_tag
methods.docstring: Get all lenses with a specific tag.

methods.name: get_related_lenses
methods.docstring: Get lenses related to a given lens based on shared tags.

methods.name: get_frame_ids_for_lenses
methods.docstring:
Get frame_id associations for a list of lens names.

Args:
    lens_names: List of lens names to look up
    lens_to_frames_map: External mapping of lens_id -> frame_ids (e.g., from lens_frames_thematic.json)
                         frame_ids is NOT in Supabase - it must be provided externally

Returns:
    Dictionary mapping lens_name -> [frame_ids]
    Example: {"Systems Thinking": ["frame_systems_complexity"], ...}

methods.name: text_search_lenses
methods.docstring: Full-text search on lens names and definitions.

methods.name: get_episode_statistics
methods.docstring: Get statistics about lenses per episode.

methods.name: update_lens_tags
methods.docstring: Update the tags (related_concepts) for a lens.

methods.name: get_stats
methods.docstring: Get overall statistics about the lens collection.

functions.name: search_similar_lenses
functions.docstring: Backward compatible function for searching lenses.

functions.name: get_lens
functions.docstring: Backward compatible function for getting a lens.
